meta.title: EFC Football Betting | Live Odds and Football Markets
meta.description: Bet on football with EFC. Browse football markets, compare live odds, manage your wallet, and play responsibly.

hero.title: Football Betting Made Simple
hero.copy: Pick football matches, compare odds, place secure bets, and follow every result from one clear EFC betting experience.
hero.secureDepositsCopy: Fund your wallet and confirm football slips with confidence.
hero.responsiblePlayCopy: Set a budget, bet on football you understand, and stay in control.

markets.title: Bet on the moments that decide a match
markets.copy: Choose simple football markets before kickoff or follow live odds while the match is running.

items.title: 1X2 Match Result
items.label: Home / Draw / Away
items.copy: Pick the match winner or back the draw before kickoff.

items.title: Over / Under Goals
items.label: Total goals
items.copy: Bet on whether the final score clears the listed goal line.

items.title: Both Teams To Score
items.label: BTTS
items.copy: Back both sides to find the net in the same match.

items.title: Correct Score
items.label: Exact result
items.copy: Choose the final scoreline for bigger football odds.

items.title: Live Betting
items.label: In play
items.copy: React to goals, cards, pressure, and late momentum.

howItWorks.title: From fixture to confirmed football bet
howItWorks.copy: A simple path for users who want to register, fund, select a football market, and track the result.
howItWorks.featureTitle: Build a bet slip around the football you know.
howItWorks.featureCopy: Review the fixture, choose the market, enter your stake, and confirm only when the bet details look right.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.copy: Register with EFC and secure your football betting profile.

steps.title: Fund your wallet
steps.copy: Start from the 5USDT minimum deposit and check the active deposit bonus.

steps.title: Choose a football match
steps.copy: Browse fixtures, compare markets, and select the bet you want.

steps.title: Place and track
steps.copy: Confirm your slip, follow the match, and review withdrawal status from 10USDT.

operations.title: EFC football platform terms at a glance
operations.copy: The landing page now reflects the EFC operation card: deposit bonus, minimum deposit, daily percentage, and minimum withdrawal.
operations.imageAlt: European Football Clubs platform operations showing deposit bonus, minimum deposit, daily percentage, and minimum withdrawal

features.title: Everything focused on football betting
features.copy: Clear football markets, secure wallet controls, and simple bet tracking keep users close to the next match.
features.walletAlt: European Football Clubs wallet rewards showing first deposit bonus, bet unlock target, referral bonus, and withdrawal charge

items.title: Competitive football odds
items.copy: Compare clear prices across popular match markets.

items.title: Live match updates
items.copy: Follow in-play movement as football matches change minute by minute.

items.title: Secure wallet controls
items.copy: Manage deposits, withdrawals, and bet history from your account.

items.title: Fast bet slip flow
items.copy: Move from fixture to confirmed bet with fewer steps.

live.title: Follow the match and react to the odds
live.copy: Live betting lets users respond to pressure, goals, cards, and momentum while the football match is still running.
live.boardTitle: Odds shift as the match changes.

bonuses.title: EFC bonus and invitation program
bonuses.copy: Match the EFC invitation bonus card with tiered active-member rewards, welcome bonus details, and agent rebate information.
bonuses.imageAlt: European Football Clubs invitation bonus tiers from 10 to 100 active members

items.title: Welcome deposit bonus
items.copy: New users can start with the 1USDT deposit bonus shown in EFC platform operations.

items.title: Invitation bonus
items.copy: Invite active members and unlock tiered USDT rewards as your football network grows.

items.title: Agent rebates
items.copy: Agent rebate levels run from 7% on the first level through 3% on the third level.

agents.title: 15% agent rebates and salary levels
agents.copy: Add the EFC agent program details from the provided rebate and salary cards.
agents.rebateAlt: European Football Clubs agent rebate levels showing 7 percent, 5 percent, and 3 percent
agents.salaryAlt: European Football Clubs agent salary levels from Agent A to Agent G

trust.title: Bet on football with clearer guardrails
trust.copy: Security, account records, and responsible betting reminders help users stay in control before and after each football bet.
trust.cardTitle: Responsible football betting belongs on the page.
trust.cardCopy: Users should set limits, review bet details, and avoid chasing losses. Football betting carries risk, so stakes should remain within a personal budget.
trust.itemCopy: Clear controls and records help users make better football betting decisions.

faq.title: Answers before the next fixture
faq.copy: A quick guide for users who want to understand football markets, live betting, and safer staking.

items.question: Which football markets can I bet on?
items.answer: EFC highlights popular match result, goals, BTTS, correct score, and live football markets.

items.question: How do I start betting?
items.answer: Create an account, fund your wallet, choose a football fixture, select your market, and confirm your slip.

items.question: Can I bet during a live football match?
items.answer: Yes. Live markets are presented for available fixtures so you can react while the match is running.

items.question: How should I manage risk?
items.answer: Set a budget before you bet, avoid chasing losses, and only stake what you can afford to lose.

cta.title: Ready for your next football pick?
cta.copy: Create an account, choose a football fixture, and place your bet with clear markets and secure account controls.

footer.copy: Football betting markets, live odds, secure wallet controls, and responsible staking guidance in one EFC experience.

slides.title: Football Betting Made Simple
slides.text: Pick matches, compare odds, place secure bets, and follow results from one clear EFC mobile experience.

slides.title: Secure wallet access
slides.text: Manage deposits, withdrawals, referrals, VIP progress, and account updates from the app.

slides.title: Built for match day
slides.text: Open your account to see live football markets, exact score odds, and your active bet history.

items.a: Open Deposit, choose an available method, enter the amount, pay to the shown destination, then upload your receipt.
Bind a wallet or bank account first, then open Withdraw, choose the account, enter your amount and transaction PIN.

items.q: Where can I see my bets?
items.a: Use My Bets from the bottom navigation to switch between unsettled and settled bet records.

finance.title: Admin Finance
finance.queueCopy: Approve deposits, settle withdrawals, and inspect payment proofs.

control.title: Control Center
control.copy: Operational admin tools for rewards, wallets, announcements, and security.
control.firstDepositBonusCopy: Applied once when an admin approves a first deposit.
control.withdrawalSettingsCopy: Configure minimum, maximum, and fee for user withdrawals.
